fields.label: Report type
fields.rationale: Report Builder is the safest default: field-list + filters, no SQL or Python. Promote to Query Report only when aggregations require raw SQL; Script Report is V2+ only.

fields.label: Standard?
fields.rationale: Standard reports live in an app's filesystem and require a module + file write. Default to non-standard (site-local) unless the user is shipping the report in an app.
